hints.description: This company is a leading provider of kidney care services, operating dialysis centers and managing integrated care networks. They focus on treating chronic kidney disease and related conditions, offering services like in-center and home dialysis, as well as kidney transplant care. The company's significant size and focus on a critical healthcare need make it a notable player in the healthcare industry.
hints.funFact1: Founded in 1994 by Kent R****, the company initially acquired a small chain of dialysis centers and rapidly expanded through acquisitions, becoming one of the largest kidney care providers in the United States.
hints.funFact2: The company has faced scrutiny and legal challenges related to billing practices and quality of care, highlighting the complexities and regulatory landscape within the healthcare sector.
